name: covy
description: Search your emails, Drive docs, Slack, and calendar from Claude Desktop.
long_description: Covy is a personal context engine. It searches your emails, Drive docs, Slack messages, and meeting notes so any Claude conversation can be grounded in the right background instantly.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search Covy-indexed context (Gmail, Drive, Slack, Calendar, memory).

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Fetch a specific Covy resource by ID.
